scripts.dev:backend: node -e "const {spawn}=require('node:child_process'); const {existsSync}=require('node:fs'); const path=require('node:path'); const backendDir=path.resolve(process.cwd(),'..','backend'); const candidates=[path.join(backendDir,'.venv','Scripts','python.exe'), path.join(backendDir,'.venv','bin','python')]; const py=candidates.find(existsSync); if(!py){ console.error('Backend virtualenv is missing at backend/.venv.'); process.exit(1); } const args=process.platform==='win32' ? '-m uvicorn app.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000' : '-m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000'; const child=spawn(`\"${py}\" ${args}`,[],{cwd:backendDir,stdio:'inherit',shell:true}); child.on('exit', code => process.exit(code ?? 0));"
